row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a straight road with slight leftward drift or lane change indicated by red trajectory line.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Red boxes indicate static or slow-moving objects (buildings, poles) and one moving object (blue box) ahead on the road.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene with multi-lane road, trees lining both sides, industrial/commercial buildings, bus stop shelter, and clear sky. Road markings including 'SLOW' text and directional arrows are visible.
semantic.visibility_notes: All elements are clearly visible with natural lighting and sharp detail. No occlusions or distortions observed.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward motion of ego vehicle; no sudden jumps or discontinuities in scenery progression.
logical.object_continuity: Static objects (buildings, trees, poles) remain consistently positioned relative to camera movement; no ghosting or duplication.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building facades, and overhead structures maintain consistent perspective and alignment throughout frames.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle moves forward steadily along the road, maintaining lane position without abrupt maneuvers.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards or risky interactions visible; environment appears calm and predictable for driving.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street layout with trees, buildings, and road markings. However, visual fidelity is reduced compared to Row 1; some details appear blurred or smeared.
semantic.visibility_notes: Objects are present but less defined; edges may be soft or slightly distorted. Some textures appear artificially smoothed or inconsistent.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Forward motion is preserved but exhibits minor flickering or warping in texture transitions between frames. Object positions track reasonably well but show slight instability.
logical.object_continuity: Most static objects persist across frames, though some exhibit subtle shape deformation or positional jitter. No complete disappearance or reappearance of major objects.
logical.structure_continuity: Overall scene structure remains coherent, but fine architectural details (e.g., window patterns, fence links) show temporal inconsistency or blurring artifacts.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward with similar trajectory as Row 1, though perceived smoothness is degraded due to generation artifacts.
decision.risk_context: No explicit risk indicators, but reduced clarity and stability may impair downstream perception systems’ ability to reliably detect or classify objects.

missing_or_weakened_elements: fine texture detail on buildings and fences
newly_introduced_elements: texture smearing around tree trunks and poles
minor geometric warping near building corners
artifacts_or_instabilities: temporal flickering in foliage and pavement textures
occasional misalignment of linear features like curbs and lane lines
